requirements.requirement: Develop and maintain a technology incident response plan with market operation-specific procedures
requirements.rationale: Ensures structured response to incidents affecting capital market operations

requirements.requirement: Ensure timely notification to SC of significant technology incidents affecting market operations
requirements.rationale: Meets regulatory notification obligations under SC-GL/6-2023

requirements.requirement: Coordinate incident response with market participants and regulators for incidents affecting market operations
requirements.rationale: Limits systemic impact through coordinated response

requirements.requirement: Conduct post-incident reviews with root cause analysis and tracked improvement actions
requirements.rationale: Drives continuous improvement in incident response capabilities
